description: Search scoping — search ONLY within scoped directories for each task type

_EXAMPLE_feature_work.description: REPLACE: describe a common task type for this repo
search_directories: REPLACE: directories to search in (e.g., src/routes/, src/services/)
exclude_from_search: REPLACE: directories to exclude (e.g., dist/, node_modules/)

verification_shortcuts.check: REPLACE: what to verify (e.g., 'Route is registered')
verification_shortcuts.file: REPLACE: exact file path to check
verification_shortcuts.look_for: REPLACE: string or pattern that must appear in the file

_rules.search_directories: Every directory must exist on disk. Include test directories when the task involves testing.
_rules.exclude_from_search: Exclude generated, derived, and unrelated directories. Do not blanket-exclude tests/ from task families that involve testing.
_rules.verification_shortcuts: The look_for string must actually appear in the referenced file. Verify before finalizing.
_rules.validation: After filling, remove all REPLACE markers and _EXAMPLE entries. Verify all directories exist.
